    94→    "  <delegate decode=\"cgm\" thread-support=\"False\" command=\""ralcgm" -d ps -oC < "%i" > "%o" 2> "%u"\"/>"
    95→    "  <delegate decode=\"dng:decode\" command=\""ufraw-batch" --silent --create-id=also --out-type=png --out-depth=16 "--output=%u.png" "%i"\"/>"
    96→    "  <delegate decode=\"edit\" stealth=\"True\" command=\""xterm" -title "Edit Image Comment" -e vi "%o"\"/>"
